##### Professional Elderly Care in a Homely Environment 

##### Family owned and caring since 2003

​

Senior citizens need more than just a safe and comfortable environment to live in. We understand that. This is why besides providing professional nursing and caregiving, we aspire to make a homely environment for your loved ones and give you peace of mind.

##### [Services](https://www.rebinasunrise.com)

​

Elderly Care

Nursing Care

Palliative Care

Hospice Care

[Home Care](https://www.rebinasunrise.com/sunrise-homecare-platform)

##### [Interested in joining the caregiving industry? We are always in need of passionate nurses and caregivers.](https://www.rebinasunrise.com/about)

[Apply now](mailto:care@rebinanursingcare.com?subject=Job Application at Rebina Sunrise)

“Thanks to everyone for all the loving care and wonderful work you gave to my mother during her stay at Rebina House.”

**_~Family of Mdm. Lee Kee~_**

**_Johor Bahru, Johor_**

“在院长英明领导下,不论医护均热情有礼,对病患亲切称呼,让病患有<家>的温暖感觉。这份用心值得赞叹。”

疗病期间，在您们细心照料下,互相配合,使病患能在治疗，康复方面得到积极的态度和信心。”

**_~Family of Mr. Tan Chek Hwan~_**

**_Johor Bahru, Johor_**

I thank the management and nurses for taking care of me and for all the acts of kindness making me comfortable and enjoyable. I also want to thank my Lord, Jesus, my comforter, provider and protector. 

**_~Mdm Tay Siew Mooi~_**

**_Johor Bahru, Johor_**
